    Set the execution platform for all pipeline functions

    set_platform.Rd

    Controls whether run_*() functions source scripts from the original module directories ("linux") or the Windows-compatible rewrites in win/ ("win"). Call once per session; individual functions can still override on a per-call basis via their use_win argument.

    set_platform(platform = c("linux", "win", "auto"))

    Arguments

    platform

    Character scalar. One of:

    "linux"

    Use original module code (the default).

    "win"

    Route script execution through win/<module>/code/. Falls back to the original script if a win/ version does not exist.

    "auto"

    Detect automatically: "win" on Windows, "linux" elsewhere.

    Value

    Invisibly returns the previous platform value so the caller can restore it with on.exit(set_platform(old)).

    Details

    This setting must be provided before any run_*() function will execute. Use setup_session to set it alongside the other required settings in one call.

    Examples

    if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
old <- set_platform("win")
run_cor_analysis()          # all scripts routed through win/
on.exit(set_platform(old))  # restore when done
} # }

    Contents
